intro: Three questions generate a recommended first semester. All rule logic is evidence-based; see new_student_considerations/advisor_brief_fall_registration.md for the underlying analysis.

questions.text: What is the student's primary interest area?
questions.subtext: Pick the closest major fit, or 'Exploratory / Unsure' if uncertain. For exploratory students, the plan emphasizes GE breadth.

questions.text: How prepared is this student for college-level work?
questions.subtext: Combine student self-report and advisor judgment; when they disagree, default to the more conservative rating.

questions.text: Is this student interested in medicine (pre-med, PA, PT/DPT)?
